category_sources: The official SourceForge project categorizes Avanor as a role-playing game.
source_facts.description calls Avanor a roguelike game with an ADOM-like UI.
display_name_sources: The official SourceForge project page titles the project Avanor.
docs_sources: The official SourceForge project page provides the maintained project summary and project resources.
source_facts.homepage is the official Avanor website.
repo_sources: The official SourceForge Avanor project page exposes a Code section; SourceForge-hosted project code is treated as the official source-control surface.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository lookup was required.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a roguelike game and ADOM-like UI.
source_facts.executables lists the avanor command-line executable.
